---
title: "Business Analytics Dashboard"
description: "Created data visualisations to convert raw business data into management insights."
author: "Esha Esha"
date: "2026-04-16"
image: ../../images/analytics.jpg
categories: [Analytics, Data, Business Intelligence]
---

# Project Overview

This project focused on transforming raw business data into dashboards that support faster and better management decisions.

## Tools Used

- Excel  
- Power BI  
- Python  
- Data Visualisation Techniques  

## Dashboard Metrics

- Revenue growth  
- Customer segments  
- Monthly trends  
- KPI tracking  

## Python Visualisation

```{python}
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

months = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May"]
sales = [12, 18, 16, 24, 28]

df = pd.DataFrame({"Month": months, "Sales": sales})

plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
plt.plot(df["Month"], df["Sales"], marker="o")
plt.title("Monthly Sales Growth")
plt.ylabel("Sales (€000)")
plt.xlabel("Month")
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
```

## Learning Outcome

This project showed how visual data analysis improves business planning, communication, and strategic decisions.
